description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The exterior features a combination of large glass windows and solid wall sections, with a prominent front façade that includes a covered entryway supported by columns. The house sits on a rectangular plot with a driveway leading to a spacious garage, and a small patio area is visible near the front. The windows are arranged in both horizontal and vertical strips, providing ample natural light to the interior. The color palette is primarily neutral, with gray and white tones dominating the exterior surfaces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a neutral gray and white exterior. Features include a covered entryway, spacious garage, and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large garage doors, covered patio, and driveway leading up to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid wall sections, vertical window strips, and the absence of major entry points.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the back façade, additional windows, and the continuation of the flat roof design.
description_view_3: Back view showing the rear wall, secondary entry or utility areas, and the driveway extending around the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with columns, wide front steps, and a minimalist door design
